query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories) as categories_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM instructors) as instructors_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses) as courses_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chapters) as chapters_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lessons) as lessons_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) as orders_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments) as enrollments_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews) as reviews_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupons) as coupons_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as users_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_config) as site_config_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_templates) as notif_count;
